channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cannabis leaves show potential for medical compounds
item.description: Researchers have identified several new compounds in cannabis leaves, including a previously unknown substance.

item.title: Study Details Fat Metabolism
item.description: Researchers have identified a protein linked to fat metabolism, potentially expanding scientific knowledge.

item.title: Water Intake Linked to Lower Kidney Stone Risk
item.description: A study explored the potential of increased water consumption in preventing kidney stone recurrence.

item.title: Study Investigates Twelve Apostles Formation
item.description: A geological study connects the Australian landmark to tectonic activity and seabed changes.
